name: Cracker Jacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Pop popcorn and set aside.
2. Heat a heavy skillet on medium heat.
3. Add oil, just enough to barely coat the bottom of the pan.
4. Add peanuts and seeds; roast lightly.
5. Add nuts and coconut; continue roasting until the coconut begins to turn golden brown.
6. Remove from heat and stir in the popcorn and honey.
7. Eat while warm or serve as a snack.
